# DB Astro Suite

DB Astro Suite is a free, professional collection of social-media focused astrophotography tools
built with Angular. The suite is designed around a single idea: go from sensor to social — take
your raw astrophotography captures and turn them into shareable, visually polished content.

## Mission
"From Sensor to Social" — bridging the gap between raw astrophotography data and shareable
social media content through automation and high-fidelity generation.

## Tools in the Suite

### Starwizz
A free browser-based 4K starfield and galaxy animation generator.
- Live: https://dbastrosuite.com/starwizz/
- LLMs: https://dbastrosuite.com/starwizz/llms.txt
- Features: real-time starfield simulation, galaxy background rendering, shooting stars,
  in-browser 4K video recording and download via MediaRecorder API

### Astrogram
A free astrophotography exposure card generator for Instagram and social media.
- Live: https://dbastrosuite.com/astrogram/
- LLMs: https://dbastrosuite.com/astrogram/llms.txt
- Features: per-filter integration time tracking (L, Ha, OIII, SII, R, G, B), circular
  progress ring visualization, plate solving with WCS annotation overlay (Messier, NGC, IC,
  Tycho-2 catalogs), Bortle scale selector, high-quality JPEG export

### File Grouper (CLI)
A Go CLI utility for automated astrophotography dataset organisation.
- Purpose: organises ASIAIR and other capture system output by camera, date, and object target
- Command: `file-grouper --organize-asiair ./path/to/raw`
- Language: Go

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Angular 21 (Standalone Components, Signals)
- **Meta-framework (Hub)**: AnalogJS (SSR/SSG for Angular)
- **Styling**: TailwindCSS 4
- **CLI**: Go

## Author
Dinesh Balaji Venkataraj
